title: Kanbus clock: reduce transition status indent

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Reduced transition status indent from 4px-equivalent to 2px-equivalent for less table-like appearance. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (15 passed). Triggered fresh state transitions on kanbus-c94998 for live verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applying follow-up tweak: transition card body (FROM:/status/TO:/status block) should be vertically centered within the slide while preserving current typography/indent rules.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Applied transition vertical-centering: TRANSITION notices now set body_center_vertical=true so FROM:/status/TO:/status block is centered on the slide. Validation: py_compile + tests/test_kanbus_clock.py (15 passed). Triggered fresh state transitions on kanbus-c94998 for live verification.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Adjustment requested: keep transition issue-ID line pinned at top under header while vertically centering only the FROM:/status/TO:/status lines below it.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implementing layout split now: transition ID remains pinned under header while only FROM/TO rows are vertically centered.

comments.author: ryan.porter
comments.text: Implemented: transition notices now pin line 1 (issue ID) directly under header and vertically center only the remaining FROM:/status/TO:/status block via new pin_first_line_top flag. Validation: python -m py_compile demos/kanbus_clock.py; uv run pytest tests/test_kanbus_clock.py -q (16 passed). Ready for visual confirmation.
